item.title: 4-1 Audio MUX and Stereo Speaker
item.description: 4-1 audio multiplexer initiated on May 12, 2020, codename EM22. Stereo speaker initiated on , codename EM21-A. Figure 1 EM21-A and EM22 These two devices were made to enjoy audio contents from multiple analog sound sources. EM22 selects output channels and EM21-A amplifies the selection and outputs them via two built-in loudspeakers, or directly via a 3.5 mm panel headphone jack. Switching between audio channels requires only a simple press on either of the four green buttons on EM22, fairly easy.

item.title: 1A Lithium Battery Charger
item.description: codename EM10 Lithium battery is one of the most commonly used power sources in amateur projects, especially in handheld devices. Under this scenario, an efficient full-featured yet low-profile battery charger which can be transparently embedded is the ultimate requirement for a part selection consideration. TP4056 from Top Power ASIC® is such a candidate. This tiny chip is an all-in-one, full featured, integrated solution supporting up to 1 ampere current lithium battery charger and costs less than $0.

item.title: 如何给你的成绩单套上一块遮羞布
item.description: .cite p { text-align: center; } .cite { text-align: center; font-size: var(--font-xl); display: block; width: 70%; margin: 2em auto; padding-top: 1em; padding-bottom: 1em; border-top: 2px solid var(--tertiary); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--tertiary); } 每一个谎言都需要一千个谎言来弥补。 ——《1001》 考试成绩差？怕丢脸？全家人的期待没法交代？或许可以试试给你的成绩做个美颜。 把成绩P到只差几分，做成惜败的假象，将自己从惨败的狼狈中解放出来，是每个笨蛋考生本场考试最后一次的挣扎。学习方法千千万万，然而失败的结果最终把我们汇聚到了这次为挽回颜面悄悄进行的拙劣尝试。 大学里，你很少看到20、30这样的低分，那是因为教授们深谙“做人留一线”的道理。他们会主动帮每个不会做题的蠢货把成绩P到59分——你依然是不及格，但至少面子上好看多了。 感谢互联网，让我们离开了教授的打捞也能轻松粉饰丢人现眼的分数。如果你的成绩通过网上查询——比如我考的这场雅思——那么你可以在1分钟内完成本次自我救赎。 ▲ 一言难尽的雅思成绩 这是在Mac的Safari浏览器里看到的，Windows上面与此类似，你可以多试验几次。 用鼠标在最碍眼的成绩——例如成绩单里让人耻笑的“口语”——上面狠狠点下右键，选择Inspect Element（检查元素）。 ▲ 右键点击要修改的部分 你会看到网页底部或者右侧出现了一个叫做“开发者工具”的面板——看上去有点复杂，因为这里会列出整个网页的源代码。然而这不重要，你只需要关心被高亮的成绩。点这里查看大图。 ▲ 每项成绩都对应着一行代码 双击“6.0”进入编辑模式，修改成“9.0”，回车。 ▲ 请随意修改成绩 基于自我催眠和心理暗示，你会看到原本丑陋的成绩单已经变得好看了不少。

item.title: Oxford Admissions Exercise: MScMCF 2020
item.description: Notes 提示 The questions are based on linear algebra, calculus, probability, partial differe ntial equations, and algorithms. 习题涉及内容有线性代数、微积分、概率论、偏微分方程及算法。 You should attempt all questions and show all working. 你应尝试完成所有习题，并记录全部解题过程。 Stating the answers without showing how they were obtained will not attract credit. 直接写出答案而未记录解答过程将无法得分。 Total points: 100 满分：100 Probability 概率 .post-content ol.exercise li ol li { list-style-type: lower-alpha; } .post-content ol.exercise li ol li ol li { list-style-type: lower-roman; } .

item.title: ebay Item Extractor
item.description: Ebay is an amazing e-commercial website containing huge amounts of goods trading on it. Thanks to Python, it is possible to extract every single detail of items on Ebay. The requests.get() function only fetches static pages, meaning that any dynamically generated pages and late-binded contents may suffer a unsuccessful retrieval. Generate URLs with Search Keywords To crawl a website, a correct resource location is required to fetch web pages containing desired contents.

item.title: Web Crawler Introduction
item.description: Web crawlers, also known as web spiders, are automated data samplers and remote content fetchers. These programmed agents retrieve web contents and store them for future analytic usage. A typical crawler loads web pages from the internet, abstracts contents of specified fields in page HTML sources, and constructs these data into a JSON object or other formats of storage. In this scenario, the crawler substitutes web browsers operated by human clients.

item.title: Conditional Offers from Universities
item.description: Offers are reception passports authorized by universities. They are tickets to your future success. A conditional offer, as the name suggests, is made to those partially qualified candidates who lack some of the requirements at the time of application. If you are made a conditional offer, this means you’ve got the potential acceptance from professors but subject to finish tasks listed in the offer. Congrats to you! You are at the front gate of your goal.

item.title: Natural-Imitating Random Number Generator
item.description: Initiated on May 12, 2012, codename EMP1. Content of this article is part of a patent pending project, and is protected by patent laws and acts. Reusing it in any form is considered illegal prior to the patent is issued. Random number generator, or RNG, is one of the most fundamental ingredients of all computers and programming languages, in the form of electronic or software modules. RNGs were invented long before mechanical or electronic computers before there were symbols for writing numbers.

item.title: Quora Q&A: Letters of Recommendation, a Unfair Aspect of Admission
item.description: Aren’t letters of recommendation an inherently unfair aspect of the college admission process? Original Quora page Samuel O. Alfred, Lead Administrator, Computational Mechanics and Artificial Intelligence Your question is a tough one but I deeply share in your sentiments. What goes on behind the scene before a recommendation letter gets to the Admission committee is usually undetected by the admissions committee. Though a letter not written by a Professor can be detected, it is not usually the case.

item.title: Essentials for Personal Statements
item.description: Length and Text 2 pages at most. Be concise, organized, free of errors. Tailor to particular institutions. Never provide a generic, lengthy biography book to your application. Professors of the admission council have no such leisure hours studying your detailed story. They, or their assistants, will quickly glance through hundreds of application materials in a couple of days. Therefore, you will have to catch their sights by using some accurate remarkable keywords in your PS.

item.title: About
item.description: I am Conmajia Hello, I am your best friend. 😘 你好，我是你最好的朋友。😘 If you’d like to support me, please donate. Love you! 如果你愿意支持我，请资助我。爱你哟！ Scan with WeChat 微信扫码 Scan with AliPay 支付宝扫码

item.title: History
item.description: Unless specified, all contents on this site are copyright. Greg Conmajia, owner of the site, reserves all rights. February 7, 2021 First publication on GitHub. January 14, 2021 Initiation.
